author: Star Wars YouTube
text:
Naboo Varykino Lakeside | 10 Hours of Relaxing Lake Ambience | Star Wars
Escape to the serene lakeside of Naboo’s Varykino — the very place where Anakin and Padmé shared quiet, unforgettable moments.

Let gentle water sounds, a visiting Peko-Peko, and the peaceful atmosphere of Naboo transport you into a world of calm and reflection. Perfect for studying, sleeping, relaxing, or simply unwinding after a long day.

author: Star Wars YouTube
text:
Tales of the Underworld Side by Side | “Asajj VS Inquisitor” BTS
Asajj Ventress faces off against a relentless Inquisitor in an intense lightsaber battle while protecting Jedi Padawan Lyco Strata. 

Check out the original animatic alongside the final imagery of the fight scene from Season 1 Episode 1 of Star Wars: Tales of the Underworld (“A Way Forward”).
